data.description: A creature you can see within range telepathically accepts your suggestions. You can suggest a course of action that the target must follow immediately, or you can take control of the target's actions until the end of your next turn.

Starting 2nd level, you use Channel divinity to create an illusory duplicate of yourself. As an action, create a perfect illusion of yourself in an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet of you. The illusion lasts for 1 minute, and ends if you lose concentration (as if broken by damage). At 1st level, gain the Warpriest fighting style proficiency. At 2nd level, you can move the illusion up to 30 feet on your bonus action each turn. The illusion remains within 120 feet of you and can be seen by any creature that can see you in battle. For as long as it exists, the illusion can act once per round as a bonus action. Additionally, both you and the illusion can take actions in the same round, but must use your own senses. When using this feature, you can make one weapon attack as an action, targeting any space within 5 feet of creature that can see the illusion, gaining advantage on rolls to hit if given how distracting the illusion is to target.
This domain focuses on the power and nature of divine beings.
channel divinity options, spells, domains features
You embody the martial prowess of your deity, granting allies temporary hit points and inspiration.
